name: Cheese Stuffed Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oven rack in the top third of the oven.
2. Preheat to 400°F.
3. Cook 20 jumbo shells in a large pot in lightly salted water. Stir occasionally until tender, but firm, about 10-12 minutes.
4. Drain the shells.
5. In a medium bowl, stir together ricotta cheese, egg yolk, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, finely chopped ham, parsley, oregano, salt, and pepper.
6. Spoon filling into each shell.
7. Do not overfill.
8. Spread 1/2 cup spaghetti sauce in a 12x9x2-inch glass baking dish or casserole.
9. Arrange shells in a single layer.
10. Top with the remaining sauce.
11. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup more Parmesan cheese.
12. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes until hot and bubbly.
